entities.name: CONIESTA IGNEFUSALIS
entities.description: The millet stem borer moth, the subject of the pheromone identification and evaluation study

entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: The crop targeted by the millet stem borer

entities.name: GAS CHROMATOGRAPHY
entities.description: Analytical technique used to detect and identify active compounds from ovipositor washings and effluvia

entities.name: ELECTROANTENNOGRAPHIC RECORDING
entities.description: Technique used to record the electrical responses of male moth antennae to specific chemical compounds

entities.name: FEMALE SEX PHEROMONE
entities.description: The chemical signal produced by female Coniesta ignefusalis moths to attract males

entities.name: (Z)-7-DODECEN-1-OL
entities.description: The major component of the female sex pheromone, essential for the attraction of male C. ignefusalis

entities.name: (Z)-5-DECEN-1-OL
entities.description: A minor component of the female sex pheromone, essential for the attraction of male C. ignefusalis

entities.name: (Z)-7-DODECENAL
entities.description: A minor component of the female sex pheromone, essential for the attraction of male C. ignefusalis

entities.name: (Z)-7-DODECENYL ACETATE
entities.description: A minor component of the female sex pheromone that, when added to the attractive blend, significantly reduces trap catch

entities.name: (Z)-9-TETRADECEN-1-OL
entities.description: A minor component of the female sex pheromone that, when added to the attractive blend, significantly reduces trap catch

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: The location where field trapping tests were conducted

entities.name: TRAPPING TESTS
entities.description: Field evaluation method used to test the effectiveness of pheromone blends in attracting male moths

entities.name: LABORATORY TESTS
entities.description: Tests used to evaluate the release rates of pheromone compounds from different dispenser materials
